calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Petitioner : Jamie Fulbright present; sworn and examined; Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: JAMIE PRATT

Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-13-2004 Off Calendar

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-25-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day for name change.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk:Marta Vallejo, CSR: Sara Lerschen
No appearances, matter is taken off calendar.
